## What MOSTRO 360 does

MOSTRO Cybersecurity is the only cybersecurity and FTC Safeguards compliance
ecosystem built exclusively for mortgage brokers. We protect brokerages from
data breaches, wire fraud, and regulatory penalties under the FTC Safeguards
Rule (GLBA). We serve independent mortgage brokers nationwide.

## Key topics this site covers

- FTC Safeguards Rule compliance for mortgage brokers
- GLBA information security requirements
- Mortgage broker data breach prevention
- Wire fraud protection for real estate and mortgage transactions
- Loan officer offboarding and NPI data custody
- AI governance and compliance for mortgage teams
- Level 1 Penetration Testing for financial services
- Browser security and endpoint protection for remote mortgage teams
- Cybersecurity compliance documentation and audit readiness

## Credentials and authority

- Official Cybersecurity Partner of STAR (Stellar MLS — largest Realtor association in Florida)
- Member: Florida Association of Mortgage Professionals (FAMP)
- Founder has 14+ years experience in cybersecurity and compliance
- Serves mortgage brokers nationwide
